name: oac-bnotk-xnp
description: Local XNP companion for notarial workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Local XNP companion for notarial workflows.
interface.longDescription: Local-only XNP companion for notarial workplace readiness, Schnittstellenstatus, API-key presence attestation and evidence flow while keeping XNP credentials and Amtstaetigkeitskontext out of SaaS and Git.
defaultPrompt: Create a Day1 plan for OaC BNotK XNP.
Review Day2 drift for OaC BNotK XNP.
